If isView is true, wait for inView const shouldShow = !isView || isInView useLayoutEffect(() => { const element = elementRef.current let annotation: RoughAnnotation | null = null let resizeObserver: ResizeObserver | null = null if (shouldShow && element) { const annotationConfig = { type: action, color, strokeWidth, animationDuration, iterations, padding, multiline, } const currentAnnotation = annotate(element, annotationConfig) annotation = currentAnnotation currentAnnotation.show() resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => { currentAnnotation.hide() currentAnnotation.show() }) resizeObserver.observe(element) resizeObserver.observe(document.body) } return () => { annotation?.remove() if (resizeObserver) { resizeObserver.disconnect() } } }, [ shouldShow, action, color, strokeWidth, animationDuration, iterations, padding, multiline, ]) return ( {children} ) } " in text-highlight component inside registry directory

1: "use client";
2: 
3: import type { Transition, UseInViewOptions } from "motion/react";
4: import { motion, useInView } from "motion/react";
5: import type { ElementType } from "react";
6: import {
7:   forwardRef,
8:   useEffect,
9:   useImperativeHandle,
10:   useRef,
11:   useState,
12: } from "react";
13: 
14: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
15: 
16: type HighlightDirection = "ltr" | "rtl" | "ttb" | "btt";
17: 
18: type TextHighlighterProps = {
19:   // The text content to be highlighted
20:   children: React.ReactNode;
21:   // HTML element to render as (default: "span")
22:   as?: ElementType;
23:   // How to trigger the animation (default: "inView")
24:   triggerType?: "hover" | "ref" | "inView" | "auto";
25:   // Animation transition configuration
26:   transition?: Transition;
27:   // Options for useInView hook when triggerType is "inView"
28:   useInViewOptions?: UseInViewOptions;
29:   // Class name for the container element
30:   className?: string;
31:   // Highlight color (CSS color string)
32:   highlightColor?: string;
33:   // Direction of the highlight animation (default: "ltr")
34:   direction?: HighlightDirection;
35: } & React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>;
36: 
37: export interface TextHighlighterRef {
38:   // Trigger the highlight animation
39:   animate: (direction?: HighlightDirection) => void;
40:   // Reset the highlight animation
41:   reset: () => void;
42: }
43: 
44: export const TextHighlighter = forwardRef<
45:   TextHighlighterRef,
46:   TextHighlighterProps
47: >(
48:   (
49:     {
50:       children,
51:       as = "span",
52:       triggerType = "inView",
53:       transition = { bounce: 0, delay: 0, duration: 1, type: "spring" },
54:       useInViewOptions = {
55:         amount: 0.1,
56:         initial: false,
57:         once: true,
58:       },
59:       className,
60:       highlightColor = "hsl(25, 90%, 80%)",
61:       direction = "ltr",
62:       ...props
63:     },
64:     ref
65:   ) => {
66:     const componentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
67:     const [isAnimating, setIsAnimating] = useState(false);
68:     const [isHovered, setIsHovered] = useState(false);
69:     const [currentDirection, setCurrentDirection] =
70:       useState<HighlightDirection>(direction);
71: 
72:     // this allows us to change the direction whenever the direction prop changes
73:     useEffect(() => {
74:       setCurrentDirection(direction);
75:     }, [direction]);
76: 
77:     const isInView =
78:       triggerType === "inView"
79:         ? useInView(componentRef, useInViewOptions)
80:         : false;
81: 
82:     useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
83:       animate: (animationDirection?: HighlightDirection) => {
84:         if (animationDirection) {
85:           setCurrentDirection(animationDirection);
86:         }
87:         setIsAnimating(true);
88:       },
89:       reset: () => setIsAnimating(false),
90:     }));
91: 
92:     let shouldAnimate = false;
93:     if (triggerType === "hover") {
94:       shouldAnimate = isHovered;
95:     } else if (triggerType === "inView") {
96:       shouldAnimate = isInView;
97:     } else if (triggerType === "ref") {
98:       shouldAnimate = isAnimating;
99:     } else if (triggerType === "auto") {
100:       shouldAnimate = true;
101:     }
102: 
103:     const ElementTag = as || "span";
104: 
105:     // Get background size based on direction
106:     const getBackgroundSize = (animated: boolean) => {
107:       switch (currentDirection) {
108:         case "ltr": {
109:           return animated ? "100% 100%" : "0% 100%";
110:         }
111:         case "rtl": {
112:           return animated ? "100% 100%" : "0% 100%";
113:         }
114:         case "ttb": {
115:           return animated ? "100% 100%" : "100% 0%";
116:         }
117:         case "btt": {
118:           return animated ? "100% 100%" : "100% 0%";
119:         }
120:         default: {
121:           return animated ? "100% 100%" : "0% 100%";
122:         }
123:       }
124:     };
125: 
126:     // Get background position based on direction
127:     const getBackgroundPosition = () => {
128:       switch (currentDirection) {
129:         case "ltr": {
130:           return "0% 0%";
131:         }
132:         case "rtl": {
133:           return "100% 0%";
134:         }
135:         case "ttb": {
136:           return "0% 0%";
137:         }
138:         case "btt": {
139:           return "0% 100%";
140:         }
141:         default: {
142:           return "0% 0%";
143:         }
144:       }
145:     };
146: 
147:     const animatedSize = getBackgroundSize(shouldAnimate);
148:     const initialSize = getBackgroundSize(false);
149:     const backgroundPosition = getBackgroundPosition();
150: 
151:     const highlightStyle = {
152:       WebkitBoxDecorationBreak: "clone",
153:       backgroundImage: `linear-gradient(${highlightColor}, ${highlightColor})`,
154:       backgroundPosition,
155:       backgroundRepeat: "no-repeat",
156:       backgroundSize: animatedSize,
157:       boxDecorationBreak: "clone",
158:     } as React.CSSProperties;
159: 
160:     return (
161:       <ElementTag
162:         ref={componentRef}
163:         onMouseEnter={() => triggerType === "hover" && setIsHovered(true)}
164:         onMouseLeave={() => triggerType === "hover" && setIsHovered(false)}
165:         {...props}
166:       >
167:         <motion.span
168:           className={cn("inline", className)}
169:           style={highlightStyle}
170:           animate={{
171:             backgroundSize: animatedSize,
172:           }}
173:           initial={{
174:             backgroundSize: initialSize,
175:           }}
176:           transition={transition}
177:         >
178:           {children}
179:         </motion.span>
180:       </ElementTag>
181:     );
182:   }
183: );
184: 
185: TextHighlighter.displayName = "TextHighlighter";
186: 
187: export default TextHighlighter;

(End of file - total 187 lines)

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: ---
2: title: Text Highlight
3: description: Animated text highlight with customizable direction, color, and trigger types.
4: ---
5: 
6: import TextHighlighterDemo from "@/demo/text-highlight-demo";
7: 
8: <ComponentPreview name="text-highlight">
9:   <TextHighlighterDemo />
10: </ComponentPreview>
11: 
12: ## Installation
13: 
14: If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:
15: 
16: <CodeBlockCommand
17:   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
18:   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
19:   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
20:   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
21: />
22: 
23: Otherwise, use the full registry URL:
24: 
25: <CodeBlockCommand
26:   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
27:   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
28:   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
29:   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
30: />
31: 
32: ## Usage
33: 
34: After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:
35: 
36: ```tsx
37: "use client";
38: 
39: import { TextHighlighter } from "@/components/prsui/text-highlight";
40: 
41: export function MyComponent() {
42:   return (
43:     <TextHighlighter
44:       as="p"
45:       className="text-4xl font-medium"
46:       highlightColor="hsl(25, 90%, 80%)"
47:       direction="ltr"
48:     >
49:       Highlighted text
50:     </TextHighlighter>
51:   );
52: }
53: ```
54: 
55: ## Props
56: 
57: | Prop               | Type                                     | Default                   | Description                                              |
58: | ------------------ | ---------------------------------------- | ------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
59: | `children`         | `React.ReactNode`                        | -                         | The text content to be highlighted.                      |
60: | `as`               | `ElementType`                            | `"span"`                  | HTML element to render as.                               |
61: | `triggerType`      | `"hover" \| "ref" \| "inView" \| "auto"` | `"inView"`                | How to trigger the animation.                            |
62: | `transition`       | `Transition`                             | `{ type: "spring", ... }` | Animation transition configuration.                      |
63: | `useInViewOptions` | `UseInViewOptions`                       | `{ once: true, ... }`     | Options for useInView hook when triggerType is "inView". |
64: | `className`        | `string`                                 | -                         | Class name for the container element.                    |
65: | `highlightColor`   | `string`                                 | `"hsl(25, 90%, 80%)"`     | Highlight color (CSS color string).                      |
66: | `direction`        | `"ltr" \| "rtl" \| "ttb" \| "btt"`       | `"ltr"`                   | Direction of the highlight animation.                    |
67: 
68: ## Ref Methods
69: 
70: The component exposes a ref with the following methods:
71: 
72: | Method                | Description                      |
73: | --------------------- | -------------------------------- |
74: | `animate(direction?)` | Trigger the highlight animation. |
75: | `reset()`             | Reset the highlight animation.   |

(End of file - total 75 lines)
</content>

input.content: "use client" import { useLayoutEffect, useRef } from "react" import type React from "react" import { useInView } from "motion/react" import { annotate } from "rough-notation" import { type RoughAnnotation } from "rough-notation/lib/model" type AnnotationAction = | "highlight" | "underline" | "box" | "circle" | "strike-through" | "crossed-off" | "bracket" interface HighlighterProps { children: React.ReactNode action?: AnnotationAction color?: string strokeWidth?: number animationDuration?: number iterations?: number padding?: number multiline?: boolean isView?: boolean } export function Highlighter({ children, action = "highlight", color = "#ffd1dc", strokeWidth = 1.5, animationDuration = 600, iterations = 2, padding = 2, multiline = true, isView = false, }: HighlighterProps) { const elementRef = useRef(null) const isInView = useInView(elementRef, { once: true, margin: "-10%", }) const shouldShow = !isView || isInView useLayoutEffect(() => { const element = elementRef.current let annotation: RoughAnnotation | null = null let resizeObserver: ResizeObserver | null = null if (shouldShow && element) { const annotationConfig = { type: action, color, strokeWidth, animationDuration, iterations, padding, multiline, } const currentAnnotation = annotate(element, annotationConfig) annotation = currentAnnotation currentAnnotation.show() resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => { currentAnnotation.hide() currentAnnotation.show() }) resizeObserver.observe(element) resizeObserver.observe(document.body) } return () => { annotation?.remove() if (resizeObserver) { resizeObserver.disconnect() } } }, [ shouldShow, action, color, strokeWidth, animationDuration, iterations, padding, multiline, ]) return ( {children} ) }

input.content:
---
title: Text Highlight
description: Animated text highlight using rough notation with customizable actions, colors, and stroke styles.
---

import TextHighlighterDemo from "@/demo/text-highlight-demo";

<ComponentPreview name="text-highlight">
  <TextHighlighterDemo />
</ComponentPreview>

## Installation

If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
/>

Otherwise, use the full registry URL:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
/>

## Usage

After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:

```tsx
"use client";

import { Highlighter } from "@/components/prsui/text-highlight";

export function MyComponent() {
  return (
    <Highlighter action="underline" color="#ffd1dc">
      Highlighted text
    </Highlighter>
  );
}
```

## Props

| Prop                | Type                                                                                  | Default          | Description                                      |
| ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `children`          | `React.ReactNode`                                                                     | -                | The text content to be highlighted               |
| `action`            | `"highlight" \| "underline" \| "box" \| "circle" \| "strike-through" \| "crossed-off" \| "bracket"` | `"highlight"`    | The annotation action type                       |
| `color`             | `string`                                                                              | `"#ffd1dc"`      | The highlight color                              |
| `strokeWidth`       | `number`                                                                              | `1.5`            | The stroke width of the annotation               |
| `animationDuration` | `number`                                                                              | `600`            | Animation duration in milliseconds               |
| `iterations`        | `number`                                                                              | `2`              | Number of animation iterations                   |
| `padding`           | `number`                                                                              | `2`              | Padding around the annotation                    |
| `multiline`         | `boolean`                                                                             | `true`           | Whether to support multiline annotations         |
| `isView`            | `boolean`                                                                             | `false`          | Whether to wait for the element to be in view    |

## Examples

### Different Actions

```tsx
<Highlighter action="underline" color="#ffd1dc">
  Underlined text
</Highlighter>

<Highlighter action="box" color="#a5f3fc">
  Boxed text
</Highlighter>

<Highlighter action="circle" color="#fecdd3">
  Circled text
</Highlighter>
```

### Custom Styling

```tsx
<Highlighter
  action="highlight"
  color="#fde68a"
  strokeWidth={2}
  animationDuration={800}
  iterations={3}
  padding={4}
>
  Custom styled highlight
</Highlighter>
```

import { useLayoutEffect, useRef } from "react"
import type React from "react"
import { useInView } from "motion/react"
import { annotate } from "rough-notation"
import { type RoughAnnotation } from "rough-notation/lib/model"

type AnnotationAction =
  | "highlight"
  | "underline"
  | "box"
  | "circle"
  | "strike-through"
  | "crossed-off"
  | "bracket"

interface HighlighterProps {
  children: React.ReactNode
  action?: AnnotationAction
  color?: string
  strokeWidth?: number
  animationDuration?: number
  iterations?: number
  padding?: number
  multiline?: boolean
  isView?: boolean
}

export function Highlighter({
  children,
  action = "highlight",
  color = "#ffd1dc",
  strokeWidth = 1.5,
  animationDuration = 600,
  iterations = 2,
  padding = 2,
  multiline = true,
  isView = false,
}: HighlighterProps) {
  const elementRef = useRef<HTMLSpanElement>(null)

  const isInView = useInView(elementRef, {
    once: true,
    margin: "-10%",
  })

  const shouldShow = !isView || isInView

  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    const element = elementRef.current
    let annotation: RoughAnnotation | null = null
    let resizeObserver: ResizeObserver | null = null

    if (shouldShow && element) {
      const annotationConfig = {
        type: action,
        color,
        strokeWidth,
        animationDuration,
        iterations,
        padding,
        multiline,
      }

      const currentAnnotation = annotate(element, annotationConfig)
      annotation = currentAnnotation
      currentAnnotation.show()

      resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
        currentAnnotation.hide()
        currentAnnotation.show()
      })

      resizeObserver.observe(element)
      resizeObserver.observe(document.body)
    }

    return () => {
      annotation?.remove()
      if (resizeObserver) {
        resizeObserver.disconnect()

todos.content: Update public/r/text-highlight.json with new component content
Update registry.json to add rough-notation dependency

content.text:
Implemented the `Highlighter` component using `rough-notation` in the text-highlight registry component. Here's what was updated:

1. **`registry/new-york/text-highlight.tsx`** — Replaced the `TextHighlighter` (CSS gradient animation) with `Highlighter` (rough notation-based annotations) using `action`, `color`, `strokeWidth`, `animationDuration`, `iterations`, `padding`, `multiline`, and `isView` props. Follows project conventions: `import type` for type imports, `const` arrow function expression, sorted object keys, and `export { Highlighter }` pattern.

2. **`components/prsui/text-highlight.tsx`** — Target file for shadcn install

3. **`public/r/text-highlight.json`** — Updated embedded content and dependencies

4. **`registry.json`** — Added `rough-notation` dependency and updated description

5. **`content/docs/components/text-highlight.mdx`** — Updated docs with new props table and usage examples

6. **`demo/text-highlight-demo.tsx`** — Updated demo to use the new `Highlighter` component with different `action` types
